meaning: adj.去核的,醉酒的,飘飘欲仙的
examples: She washed and stoned the cherry.
When he failed, he was stoned and beheaded.
The Apostle Paul was beaten, shipwrecked, stoned, imprisoned, and all sorts of horrible things.
On December 6th a mob stoned a Venezuelan aircraft which landed at Riberalta, in the northern jungle.
